title: cornopteris banajaoensis
intro: Cornopteris banajaoensis is a species of fern, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Its leaves and stems are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing relief from pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cornopteris banajaoensis is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
